_comment: SYNTHETIC target graph for T4 Case B (PASS). Same real target_graph.json shape (domains -> {package, components, entities}; components keyed by class NAME). The XService component's `implemented_rules` array covers ALL FOUR of REQ_X's rule ids -- RULE-001, RULE-002, VAL-001, ERR-001 -- each with STRONG evidence. This is the only configuration that may PASS under the fixed compare_graphs: class exists, coverage == 1.0, every error_path covered, and evidence strength acceptable for PASS.

_design.COVERAGE: Covers RULE-001, RULE-002, VAL-001, ERR-001 = 4 of 4 rule ids -> coverage 1.0 with the error_path satisfied -> PASS.
_design.EVIDENCE_STRENGTH: All ids 'strong' so PASS holds under default AND --strict evidence requirements.
_design.DELTA_FROM_PARTIAL: Identical to target_graph_partial_evidence.json except it ADDS the ERR-001 evidence entry -- isolating the error_path coverage as the single bit that flips PARTIAL -> PASS.
